efficiency_constants.materialisation_note: full REAL materialisation pass, 2 shared cores, 2026-07-12 (this build; PROPOSED-ASM-1429 one-off cost row)
efficiency_constants.no_direction_presumed: the ledger may show the engine cheaper at any realistic N (PROPOSED-ASM-1429); this manifest presumes nothing
efficiency_constants.train_flops_formula: 6 * N_active_base * tokens_seen (disclosed formula; descriptive ledger field, identical across arms)

eval_ledger_note: review fix 4: per arm/rung/seed wall seconds + peak memory; instrument named per entry; row-level tokens_in/flops_formula/attempts carry the rest of the per-arm efficiency vector

models.dtype: fp32 everywhere (train + eval), greedy forced-choice eval — the RULES-1 frozen hardware line carried over (PROPOSED-ASM-1439)

outcome_note: NOT a hypothesis verdict — raw run-record rows only; the verdict is computed by the pinned analysis/rules_2.py + tools/registry/verdict-gen.py under run-vs-audit separation

pins._freeze_reverify_note: PROPOSED-ASM-1459: at freeze the coordinator re-hashes materialise_closure.py + analysis/rules_2.py against these pins, regenerates data/rules2-train ('build') and the c8 gate ('c8') from the pinned bytes, and verifies the corpus digest + c8 sha reproduce byte-exactly (deterministic, ~5 s CPU) BEFORE prereg-freeze.
pins._pin_notes: corpus + engine artifact pins verbatim from the FROZEN rules-1/rules-1-c records (PROPOSED-ASM-1437: twin/rules.n3/certificate/eval corpora are IDENTICAL in both); rules1RunnerPySha256 is the RULES-1-C bytes 91d780f3... (REWORK-3, PROPOSED-ASM-1800: rules-1-b's relation-word frame was superseded by the FROZEN rules-1-c entity form, registry/experiments/rules-1-c.json 09b246dc...; importing the rules-1-b bytes would rebuild the measured-dead instrument) because rules2_runner IMPORTS its arm drivers byte-identical (B4 = rules-1-c A3 verbatim; entity prompt frames, entity context builder, verbaliser, licensed rejections, gold-leak guard). All imported-module pins are verified on RAW BYTES BEFORE import (review fix 6). rules2-train regenerated on the entity form (REWORK-3) and repinned; c8 regenerated from the new corpus (gate PASS 0/858 unchanged). poc/rules-1, poc/f2b-transfer, poc/f2b, poc/deconf-b trees are NOT modified by this build.

prompt_surface_note: review fix 1 (REWORK-3 entity form): S-out prompts are a pure function of the cell (no per-arm padding) — byte-identical across B0/B1/B2/B3/B5/c1p by construction, uniform 3-option decode (2-option anti-echo set + trained refusal, chance 0.5). B4 + the s3' gap2 surface are STRUCK (issue #24 decision (C), Appendix C)
repeat_note: per-arm byte-identical S-out repeat (G4, PROPOSED-ASM-1439/1451): pass 2 is scored in-process and compared by decision sha; rows come from pass 1 only
shard_note: sharded parallel launch (independent arm x seed jobs; PROPOSED-ASM-1459 merge protocol): shards are combined by poc/rules-2/merge_shards.py, which asserts identical pins/prompt-surface shas and reconstructs the canonical results-rules2.json the pinned analysis consumes
